text.title: Golden Paths: Opinionated Self-Service Templates Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Teams build shadow infra to escape the template.
antipattern.root-cause: Forced template with no escape hatch.
antipattern.fix: Make it the easy path, not the only path.

antipattern.symptom: Templates ship without observability or security; defeats the point.
antipattern.fix: Bake CI + obs + sec + tags into every template.

antipattern.symptom: Service breaks because template was mutated upstream.
antipattern.fix: Tag releases; pin claims to versions.
